fixes.summary: Added canonical client-safe ranking block decision helper and applied across overview/prioritization/debug surfaces.
Implemented graph modes (clean_structure default, failure_path, selected_node, full_registry) and dense-view warning.
Kept Overview compact while adding OC unavailable compact fail-closed messaging.
Polished dark-mode classes for graph-adjacent cards and inspectors without changing status semantics.
Expanded Jest coverage for graph mode behavior, ranking fail-closed rendering, and OC unavailable message.
